_comment: issue #210 區級資源包（castle）：一店一包、多類別共用同一城堡 packStyle；既有素材沿用不重生（#196 itemDesc 全數保留，由原 castle-seamstress／castle-royal-cloak-room 合併）。

packStyle.name: 城堡服飾 Castle Outfitter
packStyle.reference: sweet castle tailoring and gentle fairytale royal wear — girl hairstyles, soft tops, skirts, regal cloaks and tiaras

items.hairstyle-twin-braid: a twin-braid girl hairstyle, front view, framing where the face would be
items.hairstyle-blonde-bob: a blonde bob girl hairstyle, front view, framing where the face would be
items.hairstyle-twin-braid-chestnut: a chestnut twin-braid girl hairstyle, front view
items.hairstyle-twin-braid-rose: a rose-tinted twin-braid girl hairstyle, front view
items.hairstyle-twin-braid-midnight: a midnight-blue twin-braid girl hairstyle, front view
items.hairstyle-twin-braid-auburn: an auburn twin-braid girl hairstyle, front view
items.hairstyle-blonde-bob-honey: a honey-blonde bob girl hairstyle, front view
items.hairstyle-blonde-bob-silver: a silver bob girl hairstyle, front view
items.hairstyle-blonde-bob-lavender: a lavender bob girl hairstyle, front view
items.hairstyle-blonde-bob-cocoa: a cocoa-brown bob girl hairstyle, front view
items.top-coral-blouse: a coral castle blouse with a soft rounded collar
items.top-rose-sailor: a rose-pink sailor top with a sailor collar
items.top-aqua-sailor: an aqua sailor top with a sailor collar
items.bottom-sky-shorts: a pair of sky-blue castle shorts
items.outer-yellow-cardigan: a little soft buttoned yellow knit cardigan
items.outer-starry-cape: a closed royal cloak fastened at the neck and falling straight down the front, fully covering and showing only the smooth outer front surface — no front opening, no gap, no inside or lining visible, scattered with small golden stars
items.outer-mint-cardigan: a soft mint-green royal knit cardigan with white collar and buttons
items.outer-rose-cardigan: a soft rose-pink royal knit cardigan with white collar and buttons
items.outer-moon-cape: a closed royal cloak fastened at the neck and falling straight down the front, fully covering and showing only the smooth outer front surface — no front opening, no gap, no inside or lining visible, decorated with a crescent moon and small stars
items.outer-aurora-cape: a closed royal cloak fastened at the neck and falling straight down the front, fully covering and showing only the smooth outer front surface — no front opening, no gap, no inside or lining visible, with a soft aurora gradient sheen
items.headtop-pearl-tiara: a delicate royal tiara set with small pearls
items.headtop-starry-tiara: a royal tiara topped with little star-shaped gems
items.headtop-ruby-tiara: a royal tiara set with a single red ruby gem
